_comment: Declares the expected pandas parse outcome for each tester CSV. Add an entry here whenever a new tester file is added. 'expect_parse_ok' = true means pd.read_csv() must succeed; false means it must raise an exception (the file intentionally contains a structural error that the app is designed to surface).

CLINPATH.csv.reason: Row 4 has extra spurious fields (ExtraField, ExtraColumn) that cause a column-count mismatch – intentional example of a malformed input the app must reject.

PROTOCOL.csv.reason: Semicolon-delimited; well-formed; produces no CDE errors after filling missing values.

DATA.csv.reason: Semicolon-delimited; well-formed; produces a CDE error on 'adjustment' column (invalid value).

SAMPLE.csv.reason: Comma-delimited; well-formed; produces a CDE error on 'condition_id' column (invalid value).

SUBJECT.csv.reason: Headers only (0 data rows); well-formed; flagged by app to skip validation.
